originalTitle: The Last House | Greta Lee and Wagner Moura | Official Trailer | Netflix
content: From director Louis Leterrier, starring Greta Lee and Wagner Moura. A family of four are suddenly sealed inside their home with no way out, and must work together to survive against both their dwindling resources and the mysterious, looming threat that is keeping them trapped. THE LAST HOUSE is on Netflix August 7. Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81914143 About Netflix: Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. The Last House | Greta Lee and Wagner Moura | Official Trailer | Netflix https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

chineseContent: 由路易斯·莱特里尔导演，格蕾塔·李和瓦格纳·莫拉主演。一个四口之家突然被困在家中，无路可逃，他们必须齐心协力才能生存，既要对抗日益减少的资源，又要面对让他们陷入困境的神秘、迫在眉睫的威胁。 《最后的房子》将于 8 月 7 日在 Netflix 上播出。在 Netflix 上观看：https://www.netflix.com/title/81914143 关于 Netflix：Netflix 是世界领先的娱乐服务公司之一，提供多种类型和语言的电视剧、电影、游戏和现场节目。会员可以随时随地随意播放、暂停和继续观看，并且可以随时更改计划。最后的房子|格蕾塔·李和瓦格纳·莫拉 |官方预告片| Netflix https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix
